nasb.text: Yet a little while and the wicked man will be no more; And you will look carefully for his place and he will not be there.

esv.text: In just a little while, the wicked will be no more; though you look carefully at his place, he will not be there.

cnv.text: 再過不久，惡人就不存在了； 你到他的地方尋找，也找不到。

ccb.text: 再过片刻，恶人必不复存在， 无处可寻。

csbs.text: 再过片刻，恶人就不复存在； 你就是在他的地方仔细查找，也找不到他。
